decisions.decision: Keep existing status compatibility by continuing to support active, resolved, closed, and draft, and accept status=all as an alias for omitting the status filter.
alternatives_rejected: Reject status=all and require callers to omit status
Narrow the public filter contract to only active and resolved

decisions.decision: Add single-valued sort and q query params using the existing invalid_query style, with q implemented as trimmed case-insensitive substring matching on title and blank q treated as no filter.
alternatives_rejected: Search across additional fields such as description
Reject blank q values instead of normalizing them away
Allow repeated sort or q parameters

decisions.decision: Apply filters conjunctively and add explicit descending sorts for volume, liquidity, and created while preserving current insertion order when sort is omitted.
alternatives_rejected: Change the default order when sort is omitted
Expose created_at in the summary payload just to support sorting

decisions.decision: Update the frontend list API and MarketList route to send status, sort, and q so the new backend contract is user-visible end to end.
alternatives_rejected: Ship backend-only support and leave the UI unchanged

steps.task: Extend backend/server.py market listing query parsing to normalize status, q, and sort and to include the applied filters in response metadata.
Expand tests/test_bayes_market_api.py coverage for status=all, duplicate params, trimmed title search, combined filters, and explicit sort order.
Update frontend API client and React Query hook signatures so /v1/markets requests can include status, sort, and q.
Update frontend/src/routes/MarketList.tsx and related frontend tests to expose status, sort, and search controls backed by the new query params.
Run targeted backend and frontend tests, then stage and commit the completed implementation.
